summary: Tested new features: Language Selector, Feedback Buttons (👍👎), and Mic functionality. All features working correctly. Backend feedback API returns success. Frontend UI elements properly implemented.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend /api/consular/chat - Returns AI response with session_id
✅ Language Selector - Dropdown visible at bottom of left panel with 5 languages (English, Hindi, Tamil, Zulu, Afrikaans)
✅ Language Dropdown - Opens correctly showing all options with country flags
✅ Feedback Buttons - 👍👎 buttons appear under bot responses (not on initial welcome message as designed)
✅ Feedback Click - Clicking thumbs up shows toast 'Thanks for the positive feedback! 👍'
✅ Feedback State - Button changes to green selected state after click
✅ Mic Button - Present with green color (not recording state)
✅ Mic Recording State - Button changes to red when clicked (recording)
✅ Chat Functionality - Send message, typing indicator, receive AI response all working
✅ Voice Speaking Indicator - Avatar shows 'Speaking...' status when audio plays
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features verified: 1) Language selector with 5 languages at bottom of left panel, 2) Feedback buttons (👍👎) under bot responses with toast notifications, 3) Mic button toggles between green (idle) and red (recording). All integrations working correctly.

mocked_apis.avatar_video: Avatar video is a placeholder image. Full video avatar with lip-sync available with Akool.com upgrade (noted in UI)

language_selector.location: Bottom of left panel under 'SELECT LANGUAGE'

feedback_buttons.location: Under each bot response (except initial welcome)
feedback_buttons.behavior: Click shows toast, button changes to selected state (green for 👍, red for 👎)
